subject: Project Management
title: The Sprint Backlog
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The Sprint Backlog.

hook.text: The sprint backlog is the team's plan for the next two weeks — items plus a sprint goal.

buildup.text: During planning, the team pulls items from the product backlog and breaks them into tasks.

discovery.text: The sprint backlog belongs to the team. Nobody outside can add or remove items mid-sprint.

twist.text: If the team finishes early, they pull more items. If they fall behind, they negotiate scope.

climax.text: The sprint backlog gives the team focus: a finite amount of work in a fixed amount of time.

punchline.text: Two weeks of clarity in a world of chaos.
